job_id.description: Identifier for the anomaly detection job.

category_id.description: Identifier for the category, which is unique in the job. If you specify neither the category ID nor the partition_field_value, the API returns information about all categories. If you specify only the partition_field_value, it returns information about all categories for the specified partition.

from.description: Skips the specified number of categories.

partition_field_value.description: Only return categories for the specified partition.

size.description: Specifies the maximum number of categories to obtain.

page.description: Configures pagination. This parameter has the `from` and `size` properties.

from.description: Skips the specified number of items.

size.description: Specifies the maximum number of items to obtain.
